ch0029_40_asuna/0101_0701_01_10:
Oh, [Name:PlayerNickname ]! You’re
finally here! I’ve been waiting forever!
ch0029_40_asuna/0101_0701_02_10:
Let me know if you ever want to recharge!
The hot springs are waiting!
ch0029_40_asuna/7101_0701_01_10:
I want to make Pasio’s hot springs just as
famous as Lavaridge’s! Any ideas?
ch0029_40_asuna/7101_0701_02_10:
What if we had Magcargo heat up the hot
springs until they’re SUPER hot, and then...
ch0029_40_asuna/7101_0701_03_10:
No, that won’t work! Magcargo’s heat is too
powerful! The hot spring would evaporate!
ch0029_40_asuna/7102_0701_01_10:
Terastallization is amazing! With it, ANY
Pokémon can be Fire type!
ch0029_40_asuna/7102_0701_02_10:
How are your Pokémon feeling? I hope
they’re fired up and ready to go!
ch0029_40_asuna/7103_0701_01_10:
Pasio may be an artificial island, but it has
an impressive volcano!
ch0029_40_asuna/7103_0701_02_10:
I wonder if it’s possible to make a hot spring
on the peak—or someplace else with a
nice view.
ch0029_40_asuna/7103_0701_03_10:
All right! First, we need to scout the location!
Let’s take a peek at the peak!
ch0029_40_asuna/7104_0701_01_10:
Changing outfits can change your mood!
I feel motivated already!
ch0029_40_asuna/7104_0701_02_10:
How about a quick battle before this hot fire
in my heart cools off?!
ch0029_40_asuna/7105_0701_01_10:
I’ve never had to worry about my skin.
Maybe it’s because I go in the hot springs
every day!
ch0029_40_asuna/7105_0701_02_10:
You should try the hot springs too,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0029_40_asuna/1701_0701_01_10:
There you are! Let me share some of the fire
in my heart!
ch0029_40_asuna/1701_0702_01_10: If you like it, it’ll give me warm fuzzies!
ch0029_40_asuna/2501_0701_01_10:
Someday, I want to visit hot springs all over
the world!
ch0029_40_asuna/2501_0701_02_10:
But I wouldn’t just visit the hot springs.
I’d also try local cuisine and see the sights!
ch0029_40_asuna/2501_0701_03_10:
By the way, Lavaridge’s specialty is Lava
Cookies! Even Pokémon love them!
ch0029_40_asuna/2501_0702_01_10:
Have you heard? There’s a hot spring in
Galar that’s surrounded by snow!
ch0029_40_asuna/2501_0702_02_10:
Hoenn is warm, so snow’s a rare sight!
Ooooh... I’m so curious!
ch0029_40_asuna/2511_0701_01_10:
What do you think is the most popular
post-bath drink?
ch0029_40_asuna/2511_0701_02_10:
I recommend soda pop! I love its fizzy tickle
when it’s chilled!
ch0029_40_asuna/2511_0702_01_10: But Moomoo Milk is also good!
ch0029_40_asuna/2511_0702_02_10:
Oh wait, there’s lemonade, too...
I can’t make up my mind!
ch0029_40_asuna/3001_0701_01_10:
Morning! Guess what!
I’m going to start my day with a cold
shower!
ch0029_40_asuna/3003_0701_01_10:
Good afternoon! How are you feeling?
Me? You know I’m on fire!
ch0029_40_asuna/3005_0701_01_10:
Good, uh...evening...
N-no, I wasn’t just dozing off!
